FX.title: [USD/JPY] DOWN: AI Detects Bearish Pressure as Japan Inflation Data Outpaces Expectations
tldr_points: Japan wholesale prices surge 4.9% YoY, signaling inflationary pressure supporting JPY
Iran geopolitical risk drives energy costs higher, fueling safe-haven flows into yen
Technical setup shows price rejection at MA20 resistance with negative momentum divergence
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY bearish on Japan inflation surge and Iran risk; sell rallies toward 150.50
FX.comment: Bearish on Japan inflation surge and Iran risk; sell rallies toward MA20 resistance

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] NEUTRAL: Tech Strength Offset by Yield Headwinds and Concentration Risk
tldr_points: Yields at 4.5% create headwinds for equity valuations
Nvidia-driven AI rally shows signs of exhaustion with fund exits
Technical support at MA20 critical; breach signals deeper correction
Large-cap stability preferred over Russell 2000 growth amid uncertainty
STOCKS.excerpt: S&P 500 flatline as 4.5% yields counter AI momentum; tactical range play warranted.
STOCKS.comment: Range-bound as 4.5% yields counter AI momentum; MA20 breach dictates next directional move

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] UP: Institutional Inflows and Regulatory Clarity Fuel Bullish Momentum
tldr_points: Institutional demand accelerates as Trump discloses strategic crypto holdings
Regulatory clarity via Clarity Act reduces compliance risk premium
Technical setup favors dip-buying toward moving average support
CRYPTO.excerpt: Institutional accumulation and regulatory progress create constructive backdrop for BTC longs
CRYPTO.comment: Institutional inflows and regulatory clarity support bullish thesis; buy at MA20 support
